title: Semaphore Keycloak OIDC integration live apply
summary: Live-apply ADR 0361 from the 0.178.127 source tree, recover the dependent docker-runtime stacks needed for Keycloak readiness, run the production Semaphore converge, and verify the controller API, OIDC login flow, project listing, and seeded self-test template end to end.

verification.observed: make converge-semaphore env=production completed successfully after restarting the mail-platform and netbox compose stacks and force-recreating the Keycloak compose stack on docker-runtime.

verification.check: Semaphore controller API and OIDC entrypoint
verification.observed: Controller verification returned pong from /api/ping and HTTP 200 from /auth/oidc/login at the live Semaphore base URL.
make semaphore-manage ACTION=list-projects listed LV3 Semaphore and the seeded Semaphore Self-Test template completed with status success.
./scripts/validate_repo.sh workstream-surfaces, make preflight WORKFLOW=converge-semaphore, and the targeted Semaphore and Keycloak pytest slice all passed on the source tree used for the live apply.

notes: This historical completed receipt was normalized to the current schema on 2026-04-14 from the original branch evidence.
Pre-apply recovery on docker-runtime restarted the mail-platform and netbox compose stacks and force-recreated the Keycloak compose stack before the successful converge.
./scripts/validate_repo.sh agent-standards still reported a topology snapshot warning outside the live-apply success criteria.

repo_validation.command: uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml python -m pytest -q tests/test_semaphore_runtime_role.py tests/test_semaphore_playbook.py tests/test_keycloak_runtime_role.py

repo_validation.details: topology snapshot stale; run generate_topology_snapshot.py if inventory changed

environment_notes: Pre-apply recovery on docker-runtime restarted mail-platform and netbox compose stacks and force-recreated the Keycloak compose stack before converge.
next_steps: Integrate the live-applied work to main, bump VERSION, and update the protected release surfaces.
